archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Tactical Esports Dashboard)

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase text-white

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-[1600px] mx-auto p-4 md:p-6 lg:p-8
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-[280px] shrink-0 border-r border-white/10 h-screen sticky top-0 bg-[#0A0A0A] flex flex-col

login_screen.wrapper: min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-[#0A0A0A] bg-cover bg-center relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-black/80 before:z-0
login_screen.card: w-full max-w-md bg-[#141414]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-lg z-10 shadow-2xl relative

sidebar.folder_header: flex items-center justify-between py-2 px-3 text-sm font-mono text-zinc-400 hover:text-white cursor-pointer group uppercase tracking-wider
sidebar.clan_item: flex items-center py-2.5 px-3 pl-8 text-sm font-medium text-zinc-300 hover:bg-white/5 hover:text-white rounded-md cursor-pointer transition-colors

data_table.wrapper: w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-white/10 bg-[#141414]
data_table.header_cell: px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-mono tracking-[0.1em] uppercase text-zinc-500 bg-[#0F0F0F] border-b border-white/10
data_table.cell: px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-zinc-300 whitespace-nowrap

badges.base: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded border text-xs font-bold uppercase

bento_stats.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6
bento_stats.item: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 p-5 rounded-md flex flex-col justify-center
bento_stats.label: text-xs font-mono text-zinc-500 mb-2 uppercase tracking-widest

testing_rules.data_testid: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, dropdowns) and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

images.description: Dark textured surface with shimmering highlights

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Ensure the UI text is exclusively in Turkish (Türkçe) as requested.
The UI is a data-dense esports/gaming dashboard. Do NOT use soft shadows or heavy rounded corners. Keep it tactical (rounded-md max) and use 1px solid borders (border-white/10).
For the Player Profile link, make sure it opens in a new tab (target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer') pointing to the RoyaleAPI URL.
Data table MUST clearly highlight war participation using semantic colors and icons: Green for Tamamını Yapanlar (✅), Yellow for Yarısını Yapanlar (🟡), and Red for Yapmayanlar (❌).
Top bar/header must contain the Manual Sync ('Manuel Senkronizasyon') button and an Auto-Sync status indicator showing the last pulled time (e.g., 'Son senkronizasyon: 3 dk önce').
History page ('Geçmiş') should include a DatePicker component from Shadcn to filter the logs visually. Filter by 'Klan Savaşı Gününün ya da hazırlık gününün bitişi'.
Folder management in the sidebar must allow grouping clans visually and should include an 'Klan Ekle' (Add Clan) button and functionality to delete a clan.
Do NOT use Space Grotesk font. Ensure you use Outfit for Headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, and JetBrains Mono for data points/tables. Import them from Google Fonts in index.html or globals.css.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions like Modals (Dialog) for adding clans, Dropdowns, and DatePickers.
Apply `data-testid` attributes to every interactable component and critical piece of information.
